---
title: "Danika Pfeiffer"
pagetitle: "Danika Pfeiffer"
first-name: "Danika"
last-name: "Pfeiffer"
credentials: "PhD, CCC-SLP"
position: "Assistant Professor"
affiliation: "Old Dominion University"
pronouns: "she/her"
orcid: "0000-0003-1080-4961"
date-joined: "2020-06-01"
order: 1
categories:
  - "Collaborator"
  - "Chair"
description-research: "Danika’s primary research interest is in enhancing young children's early language and literacy skills through collaborative school-based partnerships. This includes providing educators with interprofessional training at the preservice and in-service levels."
description-os: "Danika is passionate about improving accessibility of research and using open science as a means to promote collaborations that enhance the research process."
link: "https://www.danikapfeiffer.com"
website-button: "Visit Dr. Pfeiffer's Website"
headshot: "../_headshots/Danika Pfeiffer.jpeg"
lightbox: false
draft: false
layout: article
title-block-categories: false
editor: source
---

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![{{< meta title >}}, {{< meta credentials >}}<br>{{< meta position >}}<br>{{< meta affiliation >}}](../_headshots/Danika Pfeiffer.jpeg)
:::
::: {.column width="5%"}
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
{{< meta description-research >}}

{{< meta description-os >}}

[{{< meta website-button>}}]({{< meta link >}}){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" data-toggle="button"}\
\
:::
::::::
